abilities.name: Biotic Pawjectiles
abilities.description: Mid-range projectile spread that heals allies and damages enemies.
abilities.spread: 0 degrees (center shot) / 0.3 degrees (close paw shots) / 0.9 degrees (far paw shows)

abilities.name: Frenetic Flight
abilities.description: Accelerate in your movement direction. Fuel recovery is slower while carrying another player.

abilities.name: Lifeline
abilities.description: Toggle into transport mode, allowing an ally to be towed. Increases movement speed and heals your ally.

abilities.name: Purr
abilities.description: Pulsing area heal that increases in frequency over time. Knockback nearby enemies when activated.

abilities.name: Catnapper
abilities.description: Dive towards a ground location, knocking down enemies and tethering the nearest one to you.

minor.name: Ulterior Motive
minor.description: 15% of Biotic Pawjectiles healing is converted into fuel.

minor.name: Transport Shielding
minor.description: Gain up to 75 shield health while carrying another hero.

major.name: Headbutt
major.description: Frenetic Flight can knockback an enemy on impact when flying fast enough. Generate 25% fuel on knockback

major.name: Claws Out
major.description: Quick Melee becomes empowered every 6 seconds, wounding enemies for 40 damage and slowing them by 30% for 1 second.
